bird.name: 冠鸦
bird.summary: 冠鸦（学名：Platylophus galericulatus），是鸦科冠鸦属的一种，分布于缅甸、文莱、泰国、印度尼西亚和马来西亚。全球活动范围约为1,530,000平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为近危。 冠鴉在傳統上被視為鴉科的一屬，但在親緣關係上，它可能更接近於叢鵙科（Ma…

locations.name: 汶莱
locations.summary: 文莱达鲁萨兰国（馬來語：Negara Brunei Darussalam；爪夷文：نڬارا بروني دارالسلام），也译作文莱和平之国，簡稱汶萊或文萊，舊亦稱婆羅乃，是位于婆羅洲北岸的东南亚国家。汶萊是北婆三邦之一，位於南海南…

locations.name: 印度尼西亚
locations.summary: 印度尼西亞共和国（印尼語：Republik Indonesia，IPA讀音：[rɛpʊblɪk ɪndɔnɛsɪa]），通稱印度尼西亞，簡稱印尼，是位于东南亚的群岛国家；由17,506個岛屿组成，是世界上最大的群島國家，疆域橫跨亞洲及大洋…

locations.name: 马来西亚
locations.summary: 馬來西亞（馬来语、英語：Malaysia），简称大馬或馬國，是位於东南亚的多元种族國家。由前馬來亚联合邦、北婆羅洲（今沙巴）、砂拉越及新加坡於1963年9月16日所組成的联邦制、议会民主制、选举君主制和君主立宪制國家。 馬来西亚全国总面积…

locations.name: 泰国
locations.summary: 泰王国（泰語：ราชอาณาจักรไทย，皇家轉寫：Ratcha-anachak Thai），通稱泰国（泰語：ประเทศไทย，皇家轉寫：Prathet Thai），舊称暹罗（泰語：สยาม，皇家轉寫：Sayam），是东南亚的君主立宪…

relations.subject: 冠鸦
relations.evidence: The crested jayshrike or crested shrikejay (Platylophus galericulatus), formerly known as the crested jay (despite not being a true jay), is a species of bird found in Brunei, Indonesia, Malaysia, Myanmar, and Thailand

relations.subject: 冠鸦
relations.evidence: Rasmussen | date=August 2024 | title=Jayshrike, shrikes, crows, mudnesters, melampittas, Ifrit, birds-of-paradise | work=IOC World Bird List Version 14.2 | url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/new/bow/crows/ | publisher=International Ornithologists' Union | access-date=13 January 2025 }} However, the family name Lophocittidae, originally described as Lophocitteae in 1855 by Johann Jakob Kaup, may have referred to the crested shrikejay, and if so would take precedence over Platylophidae. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest of the Thai-Malay Peninsula, Sumatra, Java, and Borneo. It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 冠鸦
relations.evidence: Rasmussen | date=August 2024 | title=Jayshrike, shrikes, crows, mudnesters, melampittas, Ifrit, birds-of-paradise | work=IOC World Bird List Version 14.2 | url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/new/bow/crows/ | publisher=International Ornithologists' Union | access-date=13 January 2025 }} However, the family name Lophocittidae, originally described as Lophocitteae in 1855 by Johann Jakob Kaup, may have referred to the crested shrikejay, and if so would take precedence over Platylophidae. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest of the Thai-Malay Peninsula, Sumatra, Java, and Borneo. It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
